rationale: Hard pass on a literal adaptation: the warm cream/red/brown fruit palette and physics-merge container directly contradict Block Blast's cool blue grid aesthetic and grid-based line-clear loop, creating a bait-and-switch risk that will tank IPM/D1 retention. The only transferable element is the broader "oddly satisfying drop-and-cascade" satisfaction beat, which does overlap with the 25-55 casual puzzle audience — so consider borrowing the ASMR pacing and chain-reaction payoff structure but rebuild it natively around polyomino drops triggering multi-line clears. Do not run the fruit creative as-is; misleading-ads policy risk on iOS is also non-trivial.
